stack: make dev (Vite dev + Traefik + Plumber single-worker, R API cache cleared before run)
method: SPA pushState navigation between genes; DOM-poll for first entity row, gene-symbol header text, and absence of visible spinners. 'Cold' = first navigation to that symbol since cache-clear; 'warm' = repeat with browser cache.
limitations: Vite dev mode is slower than production bundle.
'Warm' SPA timings of 51ms reflect re-mounting the same view with reactive reuse; real user warm reload is closer to cold in production.
allDoneMs detection ends when last spinner disappears, but doesn't wait for ClinVar lollipop redraw; treat allDone as 'meaningful content for all sections' not 'pixel-perfect final paint'.

results.note: page already on GRIN2B; SPA reused state. Use SCN2A/MECP2/SHANK3/IFT172 for cold numbers.

summary.interpretation: User sees the gene name/identifier band ~135ms after nav, but Associated Entities (the curated SysNDD data) lags by ~520ms because TablesEntities is gated by the v-if loading flag which requires gene API to resolve and then a nextTick. External cards lag entities by another ~200-400ms (not captured here).

targets_for_after.median_entities_visible_ms: <= 250 (cold) — kick TablesEntities off mount, no gene-API gate
targets_for_after.median_header_visible_ms: <= 100 (cold) — skeleton paints immediately, gene record fills inline
